assessment_objectives.objective: oversight measures for Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Autonomous Technologies (AAT) are commensurate with the AAT's assessed risk(s).
oversight measures for Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Autonomous Technologies (AAT) are commensurate with the AAT's level of autonomy.
oversight measures for Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Autonomous Technologies (AAT) are commensurate with the AAT's context of use.
